subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the Sovereign of Might, while He was seated upon the Throne of Utterance in days wherein He proclaimed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الجبروت اذ کان مستویا علی عرش البیان فی ایام فیها نادی
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
